mechanism_narrative: A declining FEDFUNDS path reduces discount rates and eases financial conditions, lifting S&P 500 prices over the next 20 trading days when the policy rate is already elevated.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive on average after FEDFUNDS is above 4.5% and falling, or if the triggered-event hit rate is below 55% over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals weakening household income growth and slower demand, which should pressure S&P 500 returns lower over the next 20 trading days when unemployment accelerates from an already elevated level.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not negative on average after UNRATE rises by 0.3pp in 3 months, or if the sign is positive in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth in RSAFS reflects resilient consumption demand, supporting near-term corporate revenue expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the sign of 5-day forward SPX returns is not positive in response to above-trend RSAFS readings, or if the rolling 1-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in INDPRO combined with stable or lower CPIAUCSL indicates real activity growth without overheating, which supports margins and should lift S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive SPX forward returns do not concentrate in months where INDPRO rises while CPIAUCSL is flat or falling, or if the joint signal underperforms either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in HOUST after a prior rise flags deteriorating housing demand and weaker cyclical growth, which should translate into negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 8% over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward SPX returns are not negative on average after HOUST falls more than 8% over 3 months, or if the signal has a hit rate below 40% across triggered events.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is rising while FEDFUNDS stays high, real policy tightness increases and equity valuation multiples compress, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns remain positive or neutral when CPIAUCSL is accelerating and FEDFUNDS is above 5%, or if the interaction term is not significant in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A falling PAYEMS trend confirms labor market deterioration and weaker consumer spending capacity, which should depress S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days once payroll growth turns negative.
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day forward SPX returns do not turn negative after two straight monthly PAYEMS declines, or if the event-conditioned median return is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous slowdown in GDPC1 and RSAFS identifies broad demand weakening, and that combined signal should forecast negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward SPX returns are not negative when both GDPC1 growth and RSAFS growth decelerate together, or if the paired signal adds no incremental predictive power versus either series alone.
